news.headline: Market rally loses momentum as S&P 500 nears all-time high. #stocks #S&P500
Upwork to attend Citizens JMP Technology Conference on March 3, 2025 at 12:00 p.m. PT/3:00 p.m. ET. CEO and CFO to speak.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Upwork Inc. shared that their President and CEO, Hayden Brown, along with CFO Erica Gessert, will be part of a fireside chat at The Citizens JMP Technology Conference in San Francisco, CA. This event is scheduled for March 3, 2025, at 12:00 p.m. PT/3:00 p.m. ET. Upwork Inc., listed on Nasdaq as UPWK, serves as the largest work marketplace globally, linking businesses with independent talent worldwide. The discussion at the conference aims to provide insights to the audience regarding the company's operations and future endeavors.

news.headline: Gibson Energy boosts dividend by 5%, announces dividend declaration.
Houston's 2025 budget criticized by CUPE Nova Scotia for favoring private profits over public services.
news.summary: In Halifax-Kjipuktuk, Nova Scotia, CUPE Nova Scotia expressed disappointment in the Houston government for favoring private profits over public services. President Nan McFadgen highlighted this as a recurring issue, noting the government's pattern of pledging millions for essential services like healthcare and housing but ultimately directing funds to private entities. This decision-making approach has left struggling public services unaddressed.

news.headline: Ross Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROST) to announce Q4 and fiscal 2024 earnings on March 4, 2025 at 4:00 p.m. Eastern time. Webcast at www.rossstores.com.
news.summary: California-based Ross Stores, Inc. (Nasdaq: ROST) is set to announce its Q4 and fiscal 2024 financial results on March 4, 2025, at around 4:00 p.m. EST. Interested individuals can tune in to a live audio webcast of the earnings call on the same day at 4:15 p.m. EST by accessing the Investors section on Ross Stores' official website at www.rossstores.com. A replay of the conference call will be accessible at the same web address after the initial broadcast.

news.headline: Sleep Number Corp. to announce Q4 and FY 2024 results on March 5, 2025; conference call at 5 p.m. EST. Visit website for info.
news.summary: Sleep Number Corporation (Nasdaq: SNBR) is set to announce its financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year ending on December 28, 2024. This information will be made public after the market closes on Wednesday, March 5, 2025. At 5 p.m. EST (4 p.m. CST; 2 p.m. PST) on the same day, the company's management will conduct a conference call to analyze the results. For those interested, the webcast can be accessed via the investor relations section of the Sleep Number website at https://ir.sleepnumber.com. The replay of the webcast will be available for later viewing.

news.headline: ConnectM sees 200% revenue growth in EV solutions with 9 new OEM partnerships, including VST Tractors and Force Motors.
news.summary: In the past year, the revenue in EV Solutions has skyrocketed by a remarkable 200% compared to the previous year. This growth has been driven by the increasing adoption of EV technology by major automotive Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs). During this period, the company successfully secured 9 new partnerships with OEMs, bringing the total number of partnerships to include renowned names like VST Tractors, Force Motors, and JBM, in addition to longstanding partners such as Volvo. This substantial progress was announced from MARLBOROUGH, Mass. on February 18, 2025.

news.headline: American Public Education, Inc. will hold Q4 and full year 2024 earnings call on March 6, 2025 at 5:00pm ET. NASDAQ: APEI.
news.summary: In Charles Town, West Virginia, on February 18, 2025, American Public Education, Inc. (NASDAQ: APEI) announced a conference call. APEI is a prominent education services provider that offers affordable educational programs through its subsidiaries. The call is set to discuss key matters and future plans.

news.headline: Innocan Pharma secures first patent in India for liposomal CBD injection, targeting $55 billion pharmaceutical market.
news.summary: A groundbreaking method for treating chronic pain has been granted intellectual property protection in India's pharmaceutical market worth $55 billion. Innocan Pharma Corporation, based in Herzliya, Israel, and Calgary, AB, announced this development on Feb. 18, 2025. Innocan, trading as CSE: INNO, FSE: IP4, and OTCQB: INNPF, is a leading player in this innovative treatment approach.

news.headline: New stablecoin by Tether co-founder offers yield, challenging existing market leaders.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that there has been a significant increase in the unemployment rate, rising to 7.5%. This represents a jump of 2.3% from the previous quarter. The number of job losses has also seen a sharp increase, with a total of 1.2 million people now without work. Additionally, the report highlighted that the manufacturing sector has been hit the hardest, with a 4.8% decrease in employment. The government has stated that they are implementing measures to address this concerning trend and are working to stimulate job growth in key industries.

news.headline: Chimerix granted 270,000 stock options to 3 new employees as inducement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: Durham-based pharmaceutical company Chimerix disclosed that on February 12, 2025, it provided inducement awards to three incoming employees in the form of non-statutory stock options. These options enable the purchase of a combined 270,000 shares of Chimerix's common stock. The grants were approved by the Compensation Committee of Chimerix's Board of Directors under Nasdaq Listing rule 5635(c)(4), considering them crucial in attracting and retaining key talent within the company.

news.headline: Cumulus Media will hold a conference call on Feb 27 at 8:30 AM ET to discuss Q4 and full year 2024 results. Press release at 8:00 AM ET.
news.summary: Atlanta-based media company Cumulus Media Inc. (NASDAQ: CMLS) has announced that they will be conducting a conference call on Thursday, February 27th, 2025 at 8:30 AM Eastern Time to review their operating performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. Prior to the call, a press release highlighting the key outcomes will be published around 8:00 AM ET. This communication will serve as a platform for Cumulus Media Inc. to share insights and key figures with investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Iovance Biotherapeutics (NASDAQ: IOVA) will announce Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on Feb 27, 2025.
news.summary: On February 18th, 2025, San Carlos-based biotechnology firm Iovance Biotherapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: IOVA) announced that they will be sharing their financial results and company updates for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on Thursday, February 27, 2025. Iovance specializes in creating innovative polyclonal tumor infiltrating lymphocyte (TIL) therapies aimed at aiding patients battling cancer. This disclosure will provide insight into the company's performance during the specified period and any developments within the organization. Market participants and stakeholders are anticipated to pay close attention to these figures and announcements in order to gauge the company's progress and future prospects.

news.headline: Goosehead Insurance, Inc. (NASDAQ: GSHD) will announce Q4 2024 results on Feb 24, 2024, after market close.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Westlake, Goosehead Insurance, Inc. (NASDAQ: GSHD) revealed plans to release its Q4 2024 results on February 24, 2024, after the market closes.

news.headline: InflaRx raised $30 million through public offering, selling 8,250,000 ordinary shares at $2 each, with additional shares available.
news.summary: In JENA, Germany, on February 18, 2025, InflaRx N.V. (Nasdaq: IFRX), a biopharmaceutical company focusing on anti-inflammatory therapeutics targeting the complement system, has successfully finished its underwritten public offering. This offering involved 8,250,000 ordinary shares priced at $2.00 per share and included pre-funded warrants for the purchase of up to 6,750,000 ordinary shares by selected investors. Each pre-funded warrant's purchase price equaled the public offering price per share reduced by $0.001, the warrant's exercise price. The total gross proceeds generated amounted to approximately $30 million, excluding the underwriting discount and offering expenses. Furthermore, the Company has provided the underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to 2,250,000 extra ordinary shares at the public offering price, after subtracting the underwriting discount.

news.headline: Halozyme reported record revenue of $1.015 billion in 2024. Q4 revenue grew 30% to $298 million. Net income rose to $137 million.2025 guidance includes total revenue of $1,150 - 1,225 million, adjusted EBITDA of $755 - $805 million, and non-GAAP EPS of $4.95 - $5.35.
news.summary: Halozyme Therapeutics reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and full year 2024. Total revenue for Q4 increased by 30% YoY to $298 million, with royalty revenue up 40% YoY to $170 million. Net income for Q4 increased by 60% YoY to $137 million. Full year 2024 saw record total revenue of $1,015 million, up 22% YoY, and record royalty revenue exceeding guidance at $571 million, a 27% YoY increase. Net income for the full year increased by 58% YoY to $444 million. Adjusted EBITDA for 2024 increased by 48% YoY to $632 million. The company reiterated its 2025 financial guidance with expected total revenue of $1,150 - 1,225 million, Adjusted EBITDA of $755 - $805 million, and non-GAAP EPS of $4.95 - $5.35. The company highlighted new regulatory approvals and partnerships, along with entering an accelerated share repurchase agreement. Halozyme aims to continue growth and development in its drug delivery technology and product sales for improved patient outcomes.

news.headline: Semler Scientific reports strong financial results with BTC yield of 107% and 3,192 BTC holdings valued at $300 million.
news.summary: Semler Scientific, Inc. reported strong financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 with income from operations at $20.9 million for the year. The company shifted towards a Bitcoin treasury strategy, acquiring 3,192 bitcoins valued at approximately $300 million by February 2025. They purchased bitcoins using operating cashflow and other monies, seeing a 200% increase in market capitalization. The BTC Yield KPI for 2024 was 107%. Revenues were $56.3 million in 2024, a decrease of $11.9 million from 2023. They entered into an equity offering program and issued $100 million in convertible notes due 2030. For Q4 2024, revenues were $12.4 million, down from $15.1 million in Q4 2023. Income from operations increased to $3.5 million, with pre-tax income at $32.6 million. The net income was $29.2 million for the quarter. Semler Scientific will discuss these results in a conference call.

news.headline: Gibson Energy's 2024 Q4 & full year results show record numbers with all-time high volumes at terminals & 5% dividend raise.
Article: Matthews International aims for long-term growth with current strategy, board, management team. Electing all three director nominees crucial to avoid short-term oversight.
news.summary: If all three of Matthews' director nominees are not elected, there will be short-term oversight by individuals who lack knowledge of Matthews' businesses.

news.headline: Susan Campfield is retiring from Norwood Financial Corp (Nasdaq: NWFL) and Wayne Bank's Board of Directors.
news.summary: Susan Campfield will be stepping down from her position on the Board of Directors of Norwood Financial Corp, listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol NWFL, as well as Wayne Bank.

news.headline: Nexstar Media appoints Samantha Osborne Reynolds as VP of Political Sales to oversee new division.
news.summary: In Irving, Texas, Nexstar Media Group has appointed Samantha Osborne Reynolds as the Vice President of Political Sales. In her new role, she will be responsible for leading the company's recently established national political sales department.

news.headline: Everspin collaborates with Lattice Semiconductor to validate MRAM for all FPGA configurations, ensuring reliability.
news.summary: Everspin Technologies, Inc. has announced that its PERSYST MRAM is now officially approved for setup on all Lattice Semiconductor Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGA). The validation of this MRAM solution, which is considered the primary developer and producer of Magnetoresistive Random Access Memory (MRAM) persistent memory products globally, comes with the utilization of the Lattice Radiant™ software suite. The validation signifies MRAM's capability as a dependable and durable configuration memory component for a wide range of applications. This approval is a significant milestone for Everspin Technologies, especially given its listing on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol MRAM.

news.headline: Shift4 reports Q4 2024 financial results, to host earnings conference call on Feb 18 at 4:10 p.m. ET. #FOUR
news.summary: Shift4, a prominent player in integrated payments and commerce technology, recently shared its Q4 2024 financial results. The report, available on their Investor Relations website, revealed key figures about their performance. Additionally, they will conduct a conference call on February 18th, 2025, at 4:10 p.m. ET to discuss these results further. This move is a strategic effort to transparently communicate with stakeholders and shareholders about the company's financial standing and strategies moving forward.

news.headline: Samsara praised by Frost & Sullivan for enhancing fleet safety and efficiency with customizable driver training methods.
news.summary: Samsara offers modern driver safety training solutions that are customizable and adaptable, assisting customers in enhancing their operations and achieving cost savings. According to research conducted by Frost & Sullivan in San Antonio on Feb. 18, 2025, Samsara plays a significant role in the commercial vehicle telematics industry.

news.headline: SiriusXM names Richard N. Baer as EVP, General Counsel & Secretary effective March 3, 2025, replacing retiring Patrick Donnelly.
news.summary: Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SIRI) revealed the selection of Richard N. Baer as the new Executive Vice President, General Counsel, and Secretary, starting from March 3, 2025, taking over from the retiring Patrick Donnelly.

news.headline: Huntsman Corp declares $0.25/share dividend; payable to stockholders on March 31, 2025, records on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: A company based in The Woodlands, Texas, Huntsman Corporation (NYSE: HUN), revealed a dividend distribution of $0.25 per share for its common stock. This dividend will be paid out on March 31, 2025, to shareholders listed as of March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Michaels Companies names David Boone as CEO for North America's leading creative destination.
news.summary: Experienced retail leader David Boone has been appointed as the Chief of The Michaels Companies, Inc. in Irving, Texas, on Feb. 18, 2025. The Michaels Companies is known as North America's top creative destination. Boone's role will involve spearheading innovation and expansion efforts for the company in the region.

US Overall Net Capital Flows Actual 87.1B (Forecast -, Previous 159.9B)
US TIC Long-Term Transactions Actual 72.0B (Forecast -, Previous 79.0B)
PERSHING TO PAY $90/SHR TO BUY 10,000,000 NEWLY SHRS OF HHH
PERSHING SQUARE ANNOUNCES REVISED PROPOSAL TO HOWARD HUGHES
Meteora co-founder resigns amid Solana meme coin, Libra controversy - no financial wrongdoing reported.
news.summary: Ben Chow, one of the co-founders of Meteora, has resigned amidst criticism surrounding the troubled launch of the Libra token, a meme coin based on Solana. The pseudonymous co-founder, Meow, who is also associated with Jupiter, clarified that there was no financial gain from the token for anyone involved in either project. Meow reiterated the absence of insider trading or financial misconduct within Jupiter or Meteora. The co-founder expressed confidence in the integrity of the teams. Additionally, Meow announced plans to bring in an independent third party for oversight. The details of this development can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GemCap Solutions to auction personal property of Solstice Marketing Concepts via public sale in San Antonio on Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in San Antonio, a secured party public sale will be conducted by GemCap Solutions, LLC, as servicer and attorney-in-fact for GemCap Holdings, LLC, in accordance with Section 9-610 of the Uniform Commercial Code. The sale aims to secure the best offer for the secured party, GemCap Holdings, LLC.

US State Dept: Rubio briefed foreign ministers of France, Germany, Italy, UK and EU following his meeting with Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov.
FTK secures $13.6MM contract for Dallas LIHTC Project.
news.summary: In Allen, Texas, FTK has been granted a $13.6 million contract for an affordable housing project in Dallas focused on Low-Income Housing Tax Credits (LIHTC).

news.headline: China seizes moment amidst US chaos, urges UN reinforcement.
Copeley Capital's OnSight Industries recapitalized by Carousel Capital in Charlotte. OnSight serves new home, multi-family markets in Southeast and Texas.
news.summary: A company based in Charlotte, North Carolina, known as OnSight, has emerged as a prominent supplier of marketing signage and additional offerings to the new home and multi-family construction sectors in the Southeast and Texas regions. They cater to an expanding clientele of developers with their diverse range of products and services.

news.headline: GeneDx stock surged 42% post smashing Q4 expectations, reported on Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Shares of GeneDx surged by over 40% on Tuesday following the biotech company's impressive fourth-quarter performance, which exceeded expectations. The strong showing propelled the stock to a significant increase in value.

news.headline: Namrata Dhanawade appointed Chief Applications Officer of SimplifyX™ effective January 1, 2025, bringing expertise in driving business value.
news.summary: Aurora, Illinois - Simplify Healthcare, a prominent enterprise SaaS solutions provider for Payers, has named Namrata Dhanawade as the Chief Applications Officer for SimplifyX™ starting January 1, 2025. Namrata, a key figure in Simplify Healthcare's evolution, is known for her exceptional skills and successful delivery of cutting-edge solutions. As Chief Applications Officer, Namrata will be responsible for steering the strategic growth and development of the company.

news.headline: Applications open for 2025 CPHYADV exam by ABQAURP for US-licensed physicians in Physician Advisor roles. Feb 18, 2025.
news.summary: In New Port Richey, Florida, on February 18, 2025, the American Board of Quality Assurance and Utilization Review Physicians (ABQAURP) has introduced the Advanced Physician Advisor Board Certification for US-licensed physicians working in Physician Advisor positions. This certification is now open to individuals across the United States.

news.headline: Nike sees a strong performance, becoming the top performer on the Dow today, following a collaboration with Kim Kardashian.
Urge for US Supreme Court to uphold pause on Trump's firing of agency head..
Hartford HealthCare's Constitution Surgery Center East in Waterford, CT named among Best Ambulatory Surgery Centers in America.
news.summary: Avon, Connecticut - On February 18, 2025, Hartford HealthCare's Constitution Surgery Center East located in Waterford, CT, has been honored for its excellence in patient safety and quality of care. Recently recognized as one of America's Best Ambulatory Surgery Centers by Newsweek, CSCE stands out as a premier healthcare facility in the region. The center, which is jointly owned by Hartford HealthCare, has demonstrated exceptional standards that have earned it this prestigious accolade.

news.headline: California initiative improves maternal health & hypertension care, Dignity Health supports AHA to reduce mortality state-wide.
news.summary: Dignity Health has increased its backing for the American Heart Association's efforts to combat maternal mortality and uncontrolled hypertension across California. This move was announced on February 18, 2025, in Los Angeles. The American Heart Association, a prominent non-profit organization focused on public health, is at the forefront of these initiatives.

news.headline: James Hardie Building Products Inc. secures a six-year deal with David Weekley Homes, a major home builder in North America.
news.summary: The leading provider of home siding in North America has revealed a significant partnership with David Weekley Homes, one of the country's biggest privately owned home builders. Chicago-based James Hardie Building Products Inc. has secured a six-year deal with their North American counterpart. This collaboration marks a major milestone for the two companies and is expected to have a substantial impact on the industry. The announcement was made on February 18, 2025, via a press release from James Hardie.

news.headline: Double Eagle IV Midco, LLC has signed a definitive purchase agreement with Diamondback Energy, Inc. in Fort Worth, Texas.
news.summary: Double Eagle IV Midco, LLC, a company based in Fort Worth, Texas, has finalized a purchase agreement with Diamondback Energy, Inc.

news.headline: Watts Water Technologies to participate in two water systems symposiums; virtual presentation on Feb 27, 2025 at 9:00 a.m.
news.summary: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. made an announcement today regarding their participation in the Gabelli 35th Annual Pump, Valve & Water Systems Symposium. The event is scheduled for Thursday, February 27, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Key executives including Robert J. Pagano, Jr. (Chief Executive Officer & President), Shashank Patel (Chief Financial Officer), and Diane McClintock (Senior Vice President FP&A and Investor Relations) will be conducting virtual presentations and hosting 1x1 meetings during the symposium. This news comes as the company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WTS, seeks to engage with stakeholders and investors.

news.headline: Overtime partners with NWSL to provide exclusive content to fans, marking the company's first collaboration with a professional women's league.
news.summary: Fans of overtime will have the opportunity to experience the most sought-after moments of the NWSL in a new way. In an unprecedented move, Overtime and the National Women's Soccer League have revealed a groundbreaking content collaboration, marking the first partnership of its kind for the company with a professional women's league. The news was announced in Brooklyn, N.Y. on Feb. 18, 2025.
